name: Energy Transition Minerals Ltd
analysis: It is coming off a base, 70% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0630, stop A$0.0535, target A$0.0720 (0.94:1) — then trail it.
